name: 我在民间破诡事
overview: After inheriting the role of a spirit guide, Wang Shiqi travels the land exorcising evil. In Taohua Town, he becomes involved in a series of supernatural cases alongside Su Wanrong and Yinlian. As they investigate, they uncover a larger conspiracy involving local corruption and a foreign faction, leading them to protect the town and its people from both human and supernatural threats.
